race.comment: CELESTIAL BOOM (10) is better than she showed on debut and the trials either side of that effort suggest that. Her latest effort was solid at Lark Hill and Pike's booking is a big tick for her chances. Drawn well and can return on a winning note. PHAT CHAPS (4) resumed after almost  a year-long spell to be 1.4L off the winner in a good return. Should be better for that performance and Watson sticks with him here. Can raise the bar now. BADGER BOB (6) sat up front last time out and missed by 1.7L at this track and trip a fortnight ago. The wider draw this time is a query, but he's showing good talent and he can go to another level again third-up. MAURICE'S PRINCESS (8) has to be included following a strong performance from the front last time out. FENNEC STORM (3) missed in a photo finish here a fortnight ago and now gets CJP on board. Can't be left out.
